title: SOURCE SECRET TOPIC ACTIVEPASSIVE VOICE BY @AMIT

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: The police arrested the thief. (SSC CGL 2023)
options: (c) The thief had been arrested by the police.
(a) The thief was arrested by the police.
(b) The thief is arrested by the police.
(d) The thief has been arrested by the police.
questions.explanation: Simple Past (V2) को Passive में 'was/were + V3' में बदला जाता है।

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: She is writing a letter. (SSC CHSL 2023)
options: (a) A letter was being written by her.
(d) A letter has been written by her.
(b) A letter is written by her.
(c) A letter is being written by her.
questions.explanation: Present Continuous (is + V-ing) को Passive में 'is/am/are + being + V3' में बदलते हैं।

questions.question: Select the correct active form: The gate was opened by the peon. (SSC CPO 2023)
options: (c) The peon has opened the gate.
(d) The peon is opening the gate.
(b) The peon opened the gate.
(a) The peon opens the gate.
questions.explanation: 'Was + V3' (Passive) को Active में वापस Simple Past (V2) में बदला जाता है।

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: They have finished the work. (SSC MTS 2023)
options: (b) The work has been finished by them.
(d) The work was finished by them.
(a) The work had been finished by them.
(c) The work is finished by them.
questions.explanation: Present Perfect (have + V3) को Passive में 'has/have + been + V3' में बदलते हैं।

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: Shut the door. (SSC Stenographer 2023)
options: (b) The door is shut.
(c) Let the door shut.
(a) Let the door be shut.
(d) You are shut the door.
questions.explanation: Imperative sentence (Order) को Passive में 'Let + Object + be + V3' से बनाया जाता है।

questions.question: Select the correct active form: The match is being played by the team. (SSC CGL 2023)
options: (b) The team has played the match.
(d) The team was playing the match.
(c) The team is playing the match.
(a) The team played the match.
questions.explanation: 'Is being + V3' (Passive) को Active में Present Continuous (is/am/are + V-ing) में बदलते हैं।

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: Did he see the movie? (SSC CHSL 2023)
options: (c) Had the movie been seen by him?
(a) Was the movie seen by him?
(b) Is the movie seen by him?
(d) Was the movie see by him?
questions.explanation: Interrogative Simple Past (Did + V1) को 'Was/Were + Sub + V3' में बदलते हैं।

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: People speak English all over the world. (SSC CPO 2023)
options: (b) English was spoken all over the world.
(c) English is being spoken all over the world.
(d) English has been spoken all over the world.
(a) English is spoken all over the world.
questions.explanation: Simple Present (V1) को Passive में 'is/am/are + V3' में बदलते हैं।

questions.question: Select the correct active form: A new car will be bought by me next year. (SSC MTS 2023)
options: (d) I will be buying a new car next year.
(a) I would buy a new car next year.
(b) I will buy a new car next year.
(c) I am buying a new car next year.
questions.explanation: Future Simple 'will be + V3' (Passive) को Active में 'will + V1' में बदलते हैं।

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: Who wrote this book? (SSC CGL 2023)
options: (a) By whom was this book written?
(b) Who was this book written?
(c) By whom this book was written?
(d) By whom is this book written?
questions.explanation: 'Who' को 'By whom' में बदलते हैं और Tense (V2) के अनुसार 'was/were + V3' का प्रयोग करते हैं।

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: I had already eaten my lunch. (SSC CHSL 2023)
options: (c) My lunch has already been eaten by me.
(a) My lunch had already been eaten by me.
(d) My lunch is already eaten by me.
(b) My lunch was already eaten by me.
questions.explanation: Past Perfect (had + V3) को Passive में 'had + been + V3' में बदला जाता है।

questions.question: Select the correct active form: Mistakes are being made by you. (SSC Selection Post 2023)
options: (a) You were making mistakes.
(c) You are making mistakes.
(d) You have made mistakes.
(b) You make mistakes.
questions.explanation: 'Are being + V3' (Passive) को Active में Present Continuous (are + making) में बदलते हैं।

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: Post this letter. (SSC MTS 2023)
options: (b) Let this letter be posted.
(a) This letter should be posted.
(d) This letter is posted.
(c) You are to post this letter.
questions.explanation: Imperative (Order) का सबसे सटीक Passive 'Let + Obj + be + V3' होता है।

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: Someone has stolen my wallet. (SSC CGL 2023)
options: (c) My wallet is stolen.
(b) My wallet was stolen.
(a) My wallet has been stolen.
(d) Someone's wallet has been stolen.
questions.explanation: जब Subject 'Someone/People' हो, तो Passive में 'by someone' लिखना जरूरी नहीं होता।

questions.question: Select the correct active form: Why was he being laughed at by you? (SSC CPO 2023)
options: (b) Why were you laughing at him?
(d) Why had you laughed at him?
(c) Why did you laugh at him?
(a) Why are you laughing at him?
questions.explanation: 'Was being + V3' (Passive) को Active में Past Continuous (was/were + V-ing) में बदला जाता है।

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: We must help the poor. (SSC CHSL 2023)
options: (a) The poor must be helped by us.
(c) The poor are helped by us.
(b) The poor should be helped by us.
(d) The poor had to be helped by us.
questions.explanation: Modals (Must/Can/May) के साथ Passive में 'Modal + be + V3' का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: Select the correct active form: By whom was the window broken? (SSC MTS 2023)
options: (a) Who broken the window?
(b) Who broke the window?
(d) Who is breaking the window?
(c) Who has broken the window?
questions.explanation: 'By whom was + V3' को Active में 'Who + V2' (Simple Past) में बदलते हैं।

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: They were painting the wall. (SSC CGL 2023)
options: (b) The wall was being painted by them.
(d) The wall is being painted by them.
(a) The wall was painted by them.
(c) The wall has been painted by them.
questions.explanation: Past Continuous (was/were + V-ing) को Passive में 'was/were + being + V3' में बदलते हैं।

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: Can you lift this box? (SSC CHSL 2023)
options: (b) Could this box be lifted by you?
(d) Can this box being lifted by you?
(c) Is this box lifted by you?
(a) Can this box be lifted by you?
questions.explanation: Modal Interrogative में 'Modal + Obj + be + V3' का पैटर्न फॉलो होता है। (नोट: Voice में Can का Could नहीं होता)।

questions.question: Select the correct active form: Our house is being cleaned by the servant. (SSC CPO 2023)
options: (b) The servant is cleaning our house.
(a) The servant cleans our house.
(d) The servant cleaned our house.
(c) The servant has cleaned our house.
questions.explanation: 'Is being + V3' को Active में Present Continuous में बदला जाता है।

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: She will write a poem. (SSC MTS 2023)
options: (b) A poem would be written by her.
(c) A poem is written by her.
(a) A poem will be written by her.
(d) A poem will be write by her.
questions.explanation: Future Simple (will + V1) को Passive में 'will be + V3' में बदलते हैं।

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: I do not know him. (SSC CGL 2023)
options: (a) He is not known by me.
(b) He is not known to me.
(c) He was not known to me.
(d) He has not known to me.
questions.explanation: 'Know' क्रिया के साथ Passive में 'by' के बजाय 'to' का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: Select the correct active form: The flowers have been plucked by the children. (SSC CHSL 2023)
options: (d) The children had plucked the flowers.
(c) The children are plucking the flowers.
(a) The children plucked the flowers.
(b) The children have plucked the flowers.
questions.explanation: 'Have been + V3' (Passive) को Active में Present Perfect (have + V3) में बदलते हैं।

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: Open the window. (SSC MTS 2023)
options: (c) The window is opened.
(d) Window should open.
(b) Let the window be open.
(a) Let the window be opened.
questions.explanation: 'Let + Object + be + V3' (Imperative structure).

questions.question: Select the correct active form: The field is being ploughed by the farmer. (SSC CGL 2023)
options: (c) The farmer has ploughed the field.
(d) The farmer was ploughing the field.
(b) The farmer is ploughing the field.
(a) The farmer ploughed the field.
questions.explanation: Present Continuous (is being + V3) को Active (is + V-ing) में बदलना।

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: Do they play cricket? (SSC CHSL 2023)
options: (b) Are cricket played by them?
(d) Is cricket being played by them?
(c) Was cricket played by them?
(a) Is cricket played by them?
questions.explanation: Simple Present (Do + V1) का Interrogative Passive 'Is/am/are + Sub + V3' से बनता है।

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: He was making a noise. (SSC CPO 2023)
options: (d) A noise had been made by him.
(b) A noise was being made by him.
(a) A noise was made by him.
(c) A noise is being made by him.
questions.explanation: Past Continuous को Passive में 'was being + V3' में बदलते हैं।

questions.question: Select the correct active form: Let the truth be told. (SSC MTS 2023)
options: (a) Tell the truth.
(c) Told the truth.
(d) You tell the truth.
(b) Speak the truth.
questions.explanation: 'Let + be + V3' को Active में सीधे V1 (Tell...) से शुरू करते हैं।

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: I am watching a movie. (SSC CGL 2023)
options: (b) A movie was being watched by me.
(d) A movie has been watched by me.
(c) A movie is watched by me.
(a) A movie is being watched by me.
questions.explanation: Present Continuous (is/am/are + V-ing) -> (is/am/are + being + V3).

questions.question: Select the correct active form: His car was stolen yesterday. (SSC CHSL 2023)
options: (d) Someone was stealing his car yesterday.
(b) Someone steals his car yesterday.
(a) Someone stole his car yesterday.
(c) Someone has stolen his car yesterday.
questions.explanation: 'Was + V3' (Simple Past Passive) को Active में V2 (stole) में बदलते हैं।

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: They had not done their homework. (SSC CPO 2023)
options: (d) Their homework is not done by them.
(c) Their homework was not done by them.
(b) Their homework has not been done by them.
(a) Their homework had not been done by them.
questions.explanation: Past Perfect Negative -> 'had not been + V3'.

questions.question: Select the correct active form: Will the bill be paid by you? (SSC MTS 2023)
options: (d) Have you paid the bill?
(c) Are you paying the bill?
(b) Would you pay the bill?
(a) Will you pay the bill?
questions.explanation: Future Interrogative Passive 'Will be + V3' -> Active 'Will + V1'.

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: He teaches us English. (SSC CGL 2023)
options: (c) English is being taught us by him.
(b) We were taught English by him.
(a) We are taught English by him.
(d) We are being taught English by him.
questions.explanation: Simple Present (V1/s/es) -> 'is/am/are + V3'.

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: I have seen the Taj Mahal. (SSC CHSL 2023)
options: (a) The Taj Mahal was seen by me.
(c) The Taj Mahal is seen by me.
(d) The Taj Mahal had been seen by me.
(b) The Taj Mahal has been seen by me.
questions.explanation: Present Perfect (have + V3) -> 'has been + V3'. (Taj Mahal singular है इसलिए has लगेगा)।

questions.question: Select the correct active form: The house was painted last week. (SSC CPO 2023)
options: (b) Someone paints the house last week.
(d) Someone was painting the house last week.
(a) Someone painted the house last week.
(c) Someone has painted the house last week.
questions.explanation: 'Was + V3' (Simple Past Passive) -> Active V2.

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: Don't smoke here. (SSC MTS 2023)
options: (c) You are requested not to smoke here.
(a) You are forbidden to smoke here.
(d) You are ordered not to smoke here.
(b) Let not smoke be here.
questions.explanation: 'Don't' वाले सुझाव/मनाही के लिए 'You are forbidden to' का प्रयोग सटीक है।

questions.question: Select the correct active form: Is a book being read by her? (SSC CGL 2023)
options: (c) Was she reading a book?
(d) Has she read a book?
(a) Is she reading a book?
(b) Does she read a book?
questions.explanation: 'Is being + V3' (Passive) -> Active 'Is + V-ing'.

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: We expect good news. (SSC CHSL 2023)
options: (b) Good news was expected by us.
(a) Good news is expected by us.
(d) Good news has been expected by us.
(c) Good news is being expected by us.
questions.explanation: 'News' हमेशा singular माना जाता है, इसलिए 'is + V3' सही है।

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: He had sent the message. (SSC CPO 2023)
options: (c) The message had been sent by him.
(a) The message was sent by him.
(d) The message is sent by him.
(b) The message has been sent by him.
questions.explanation: Past Perfect (had + V3) -> 'had been + V3'.

questions.question: Select the correct active form: Let the lamp be lighted. (SSC MTS 2023)
options: (d) Lamp is lighted.
(a) Light the lamp.
(c) You light the lamp.
(b) Lighted the lamp.
questions.explanation: 'Let + be + V3' -> Active V1.

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: I saw him opening the box. (SSC CGL Tier II 2023)
options: (c) He had been seen opening the box by me.
(b) He is seen opening the box by me.
(d) He was being seen opening the box by me.
(a) He was seen opening the box by me.
questions.explanation: Simple Past (saw) -> 'was seen'. 'Opening' (participle) वैसा ही रहेगा।

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: They are building a bridge. (SSC CHSL 2023)
options: (d) A bridge has been built by them.
(a) A bridge is built by them.
(b) A bridge is being built by them.
(c) A bridge was being built by them.
questions.explanation: Present Continuous -> 'is being + V3'.

questions.question: Select the correct active form: The door was locked by my father. (SSC CPO 2023)
options: (b) My father locked the door.
(a) My father locks the door.
(d) My father is locking the door.
(c) My father has locked the door.
questions.explanation: 'Was locked' (Passive V2) -> Active V2.

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: Did you invite them? (SSC MTS 2023)
options: (b) Are they invited by you?
(d) Were they invite by you?
(c) Had they been invited by you?
(a) Were they invited by you?
questions.explanation: Interrogative Past 'Did' -> 'Was/Were + V3'. 'Them' का 'They' हो जाएगा।

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: She looks after the child. (SSC CGL 2023)
options: (c) The child is being looked after by her.
(a) The child is looked after by her.
(b) The child was looked after by her.
(d) The child has been looked after by her.
questions.explanation: 'Look after' (Phrasal verb) में 'after' क्रिया के साथ ही रहता है। Simple Present -> 'is + V3'.

questions.question: Select the correct active form: By whom were you taught English? (SSC CHSL 2023)
options: (c) Who has taught you English?
(a) Who taught you English?
(d) Who was teaching you English?
(b) Who teaches you English?
questions.explanation: 'By whom were + V3' -> Active 'Who + V2'.

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: Help the needy. (SSC MTS 2023)
options: (c) You are requested to help the needy.
(d) Needy are helped.
(b) Let the needy helped.
(a) The needy should be helped.
questions.explanation: नैतिक सुझाव (Moral Advice) के लिए 'Should be + V3' सबसे अच्छा विकल्प है।

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: I will never forget this experience. (SSC CGL 2023)
options: (a) This experience will never be forgotten by me.
(d) This experience is never forgotten by me.
(b) This experience would never be forgotten by me.
(c) This experience will never be forgot by me.
questions.explanation: Future Simple Negative -> 'will never be + V3'.

questions.question: Select the correct active form: The match had been won by our team. (SSC CPO 2023)
options: (d) Our team was winning the match.
(b) Our team had won the match.
(a) Our team has won the match.
(c) Our team won the match.
questions.explanation: Past Perfect Passive (had been + V3) -> Active (had + V3).

questions.question: Select the correct passive form: Are they singing a song? (SSC MTS 2023)
options: (b) Are a song being sung by them?
(d) Has a song been sung by them?
(c) Was a song being sung by them?
(a) Is a song being sung by them?
questions.explanation: Interrogative Present Continuous -> 'Is + Sub + being + V3'. 'Song' singular है इसलिए 'is' लगेगा।
